---
name: Doc Task
about: A documentation task. Defaults to a subtask of a parent issue
title: "[Doc] "
labels: kind/documentation

---
<!-- Defaults to a subtask of a parent (tracking) issue. To use as a standalone/normal issue, overwrite the feature section below with the actual details. -->

**What is the feature and Why is this needed**:

The feature is detailed in the parent issue.

**Doc requirements**:

- Provide user-facing documentation for **this feature** on [matrixhub.ai](https://matrixhub.ai).
- If existing documentation for a related feature already covers this functionality, paste the link(s) to that documentation instead of writing a separate page.
- Provide both **English** and **Chinese** versions.
- For UI features, include **screenshots** in the documentation.

---

**Completion checklist**:

- [ ] **Final user doc link**: <!-- paste the URL(s) on matrixhub.ai for this feature (EN + CN); or link to existing related-feature docs if they already cover this; if not applicable, write "No user doc needed" -->

The artifacts above should be described or linked in this checklist.

Before closing this issue, ensure all checklist items above are completed and checked off.
